arts.ttl: Why is Thibaut Courtois not playing for Real Madrid against Celta Vigo today in the Copa del Rey?
arts.sum: Real Madrid will be without first-choice goalkeeper Thibaut Courtois for their Copa del Rey game against Celta de Vigo on Thursday evening, as Ancelotti left him out of the squad. The game between Real Madrid and Celta will be played on Thursday January 16 at Santiago Bernabéu with kick off at 3:30 p.m. ET / 12:30 p.m. PT .

arts.ttl: Man United legend takes swipe at Kylian Mbappe and claims he should 'NEVER' be compared to Thierry Henry after struggles at Real Madrid
arts.sum: Madrid signed Mbappe from PSG for free in the summer to make him the star of the show but he has lagged behind Vinicius Junior, recording 17 goal contributions to the Brazilian's 23.

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold contract latest: NO agreement with Real Madrid
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold has not reached an agreement to join Real Madrid on a free transfer this summer, despite claims to the contrary in Spain this week. This season that has invariably involved their interest in Alexander-Arnold, and this week saw claims the right-back had now reached a verbal agreement to join on a free transfer at the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Predicted Teams Real Madrid-Celta Vigo: Carlo Ancelotti to go all-out for Copa del Rey clash
arts.sum: Real Madrid and Celta Vigo are both aiming to progress to the quarter-finals of the 2024-25 Copa del Rey, as the two teams prepare to face off at the Santiago Bernabeu on Thursday evening.
